assertions.text: The vehicle was traveling just under 80 km/h on the highway.
The driver was easing off the throttle (reducing speed) as traffic slowed.
There was a single impact (one jolt only).
The vehicle dropped to a crawl within a couple of seconds after the impact.
No explicit braking is claimed; only easing off the throttle is reported (no confirmed brake application).

verdicts.evidence: The GPS speed at the start of the window is [79.0 km/h](T2) and the first gps sample is [79.0 km/h at t=0.0 s](T4), which matches the claim of just under 80 km/h.

GPS speed shows a gradual decline from [79.0 km/h at t=0.0 s] to [70.0 km/h at t=8.0 s] before the impact period (see samples [79.0,78.0,77.0,76.0,75.0,74.0,72.0,71.0,70.0] km/h at t=[0–8] s)(T4), consistent with easing off the throttle.
Detect_events found two distinct impact spikes on accel_x at [t=9.20 s] (magnitude [4.7 g]) and [t=10.17 s] (magnitude [5.75 g]) (T3), so the claim of a single impact is contradicted.

GPS speed fell from [70.0 km/h at t=8.0 s] to [43.0 km/h at t=11.0 s] (a drop of [27.0 km/h] over ~[3.0 s]) as detected by the speed_drop event between [t=8.0–11.0 s], and the last faster-to-crawl samples show [43.0 km/h at t=11.0 s] down to [12.0 km/h at t=16.0 s] (T3)(T4).

No brake channel is available in the window and detect_events lists brake transitions as a detectable type but none were reported; the telemetry shows GPS speed decline and IMU impulses but does not directly record brake pedal applications, so the statement about no confirmed brake application is unverifiable from the available channels (see gps speed trend and detections) (T2)(T3)(T4).

result.rationale: Telemetry supports initial speed and the pre-impact easing off, shows multiple impact spikes contradicting the single-impact claim, and records a rapid speed drop to a crawl within a few seconds. Brake application cannot be confirmed with available channels.

result.notes: 100 Hz IMU over a 16 s window. Units: accel g, gyro deg/s, speed km/h. Device-to-vehicle axis alignment is NOT documented; do not assume which axis is longitudinal without cross-checking against GPS speed.

accel_x.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_y.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_z.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

detections.note: direction ambiguous: device axis orientation undocumented
rollover-suspect if on a roll/pitch axis; axis frame undocumented

result.thresholds_doc: impact spike: |a-baseline|>2.5g (>=20ms, merged<0.25s); sustained: 0.5s-avg in 0.35-1.2g; rotation: >40.0deg/s for 0.3s; net rotation >60.0deg; speed drop: >=15.0km/h in <=3.0s; brake: 0->1 transitions; CISS impact: max |crash-pulse delta-V|

result.downsampling: per-bucket sample with the largest |deviation from channel median| is kept
